title: Finite DAG Topological Order Certificates

solver_reuse.target: finite DAG topological edge-order QF_LIA regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Replay checks two valid topological orders and one cyclic obstruction, then the source-linked QF_LIA artifact isolates the malformed order as the impossible edge-position obligation 2 < 1.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional DAG rows only when they add distinct vertex-coverage, edge-order, cycle-obstruction, acyclicity, or proof-reconstruction pressure; keep Kahn/DFS algorithm correctness and linear-extension theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Replay finite directed graphs and topological orders by checking every vertex appears exactly once.
Check every directed edge against the listed order position.
Reject malformed rows by naming a concrete edge whose order is violated.
Reject cyclic ordering claims by replaying a directed cycle witness.
Keep the promoted edge-order row tied to a committed SMT-LIB artifact and checked QF_LIA arithmetic evidence.
Keep general topological-sort algorithm correctness, linear-extension existence, and asymptotic complexity as Lean/theorem horizons until proof artifacts exist.
